truthOwner: DSH committed partner, store, document, visit and audit records
activationPolicy: Each surface binds its governed actor type before accepting a two-field phone and code activation form.
conflictPolicy: Reload committed state before another mutation.
successPolicy: A surface may report success only after committed readback or a canonical mutation response followed by list/detail refresh.
finalVerificationPolicy: All required contexts must report success on the resolved final branch head before READY_FOR_REVIEW is reported.
